en-US.name: HELM Command
en-US.summary: HELM Custom Skill voice control companion.
en-US.description: Enables operators and founders to check HELM deployment status and place locks via voice commands.
examplePhrases: Alexa, ask HELM Command for status
Alexa, ask HELM Command to run continuous monitoring

publishingInformation.testingInstructions: Requires OAuth 2.0 Account Linking with HELM Gateway identity.
